title: cephaelis tricholoba
intro: Cephaelis tricholoba, also known as the Guayacan plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cephaelis tricholoba include the treatment of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin infections. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture for medicinal purposes, and its bark and roots are also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
